zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice II de Mowbray於大約1275年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾吉可林頓時，她的父親Sir William MOWBRAY34歲，母親Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme30歲。她於大約1293年與Robert Conyers在英國英格蘭越可爾瑟斯克結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1304年在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾瑟斯克享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice II de Mowbray于大约1275年出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾吉可林頓时，她的父亲Sir William MOWBRAY34岁，母亲Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme30岁。她于大约1293年与Robert Conyers在英国英格兰越可爾瑟斯克结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1304年在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾瑟斯克享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice II de Mowbray was born about 1275, in Kirklington, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William MOWBRAY, was 34 and her mother, Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme, was 30. She married Robert Conyers about 1293, in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1304, in Thirsk, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice II de Mowbray est née environ 1275, à Kirklington, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William MOWBRAY, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Conyers environ 1293, à Thirsk, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1304, à Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 31 ans.

Sie hat um 1293 in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Robert Conyers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice II de Mowbray è nata il circa 1275 nel Kirklington, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William MOWBRAY, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Robert Conyers circa 1293, nel Thirsk, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1304, nel Thirsk, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice II de Mowbrayが約1275年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアキルクリントンで生まれた時，父Sir William MOWBRAYは34歳，母Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholmeは30歳であった。約1293年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスイルスクでRobert Conyersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1304年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスイルスクで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice II de Mowbray(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 커크링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William MOWBRAY(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1293년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 Robert Conyers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1304년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice II de Mowbray nasceu aproximadamente 1275, em Kirklington, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William MOWBRAY, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme, tinha 30 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice II de Mowbray родилась около 1275 г. в местности кирклингтон, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William MOWBRAY было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Matilda De Mowbray of Axholme, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Conyers около 1293 г. в местности тирск, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1304 г. в местности тирск, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 31 год.
